name: Crispy Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate chicken wings at joints; discard tips.
2. Mix egg, 2 tablespoons oil, soy sauce, sugar, salt, and five-spice powder; pour over chicken. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
3. Add water to chicken.
4. Stir flour, cornstarch, and baking soda into the chicken.
5. Heat oil (1/2 inch) in a Dutch oven or wok to 350°F.
6. Fry 4-5 chicken pieces at a time about 4 minutes, turning 2-3 times, until light brown; drain on paper towel.
7. Increase oil temperature to 375°F.
8. Fry half of the chicken pieces for 1 minute or until golden brown; drain on paper towel. Repeat with remaining chicken.
9. Serve with sweet-and-sour sauce or hot mustard if desired.
